segments.speaker: Advisor
segments.text: Hi, come on in. How can I help?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Hi, I'm a new international PhD student. I wanted to make sure I'm not missing any required steps.

segments.speaker: Advisor
segments.text: Good idea. Have you checked in with your I-20 and passport yet?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I have them with me. Should I upload copies somewhere, or do you need to see them in person?

segments.speaker: Advisor
segments.text: We'll verify them here, and then you'll update your local address online.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Okay. I'm in temporary housing for now. Is that address okay, or should I wait until I move?

segments.speaker: Advisor
segments.text: Use the temporary address now, then update it when you move.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Got it. I also wanted to ask about health insurance. Is enrollment automatic?

segments.speaker: Advisor
segments.text: For most full-time students, yes, but double-check your student portal.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Perfect. And orientation - is there anything I should do before attending?

segments.speaker: Advisor
segments.text: Bring your laptop and any questions you have.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Great. Thanks for helping me get my footing.
